sections.paragraph:
γρόνθος, ου, ὁ =πυγμή ‘clenched hand’ (Moeris p. 323 πύξ Ἀττικῶς, γ. Ἑλληνικῶς; schol. on Il. 219; PAmh 141, 10 [IV a.d.]; Aq. Ex 21:18, Judg 3:16, Is 58:4) fist γ. ἀντὶ γρόνθου blow for blow Pol 2:2.—DELG.

Moeris Moeris , attic., II a.d.—List 5

schol. schol. = scholion, scholia, scholiast

Il. Il. = Iliad, s. Hom.—List 5

PAmh PAmh = The Amherst Papyri I–II—List 4

Aq Aq , II a.d.—List 5

Pol Pol = Polycarp to the Philippians—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 208
